fields.summary: Describes a single variation axis of a variable font.
fields.remarks:
<format type="text/markdown"><![CDATA[
## Remarks

`SKFontVariationAxis` describes one axis of a variable font as returned by
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface.VariationDesignParameters> or
<xref:SkiaSharp.SKTypeface.GetVariationDesignParameters(System.Span{SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis})>.
Each axis has a four-byte tag identifier, a minimum value, a default value, and a
maximum value. The <xref:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis.IsHidden> property indicates
whether the axis is intended for internal use and should not be exposed in a UI.

This type is a value type and does not require disposal.

## Examples

```csharp
// Enumerate the variation axes of a typeface
foreach (var axis in typeface.VariationDesignParameters)
{
    Console.WriteLine($"{axis.Tag}: [{axis.Min}, {axis.Default}, {axis.Max}]");
}
```
]]></format>

fields.summary: Gets or sets the default value of the variation axis.
fields.value: The default design coordinate for this axis.

fields.summary: Indicates whether this instance is equal to the specified <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" />.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if all fields are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.obj: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> to compare with this instance.

fields.summary: Indicates whether this instance is equal to the specified object.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="obj" /> is an <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> with the same values; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.obj: The object to compare with this instance.

entries.signature: public override readonly bool Equals (object obj);

fields.summary: Returns the hash code for this instance.
fields.returns: A hash code for the current <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" />.

fields.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the variation axis is hidden.
fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the axis is flagged as hidden and should not be displayed in a font-selection UI; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the maximum value of the variation axis.
fields.value: The upper bound of the allowable design coordinate range for this axis.

fields.summary: Gets or sets the minimum value of the variation axis.
fields.value: The lower bound of the allowable design coordinate range for this axis.

fields.summary: Determines whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> values are equal.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="left" /> and <paramref name="right" /> are equal; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public static bool operator == (SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis left, SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis right);

fields.summary: Determines whether two <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis" /> values are not equal.
fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if <paramref name="left" /> and <paramref name="right" /> differ; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

entries.signature: public static bool operator != (SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis left, SkiaSharp.SKFontVariationAxis right);

fields.summary: Gets or sets the four-byte tag that identifies this variation axis.
fields.value: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag" /> identifier for the axis (for example, <c>'w','g','h','t'</c> for weight).
